subject: [COMMON] Add some python linters in tox.ini
commit_message:
[COMMON] Add some python linters in tox.ini

and configure them with a few reasonable parameters

Issue-ID: OOM-2643
Signed-off-by: Guillaume Lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ic1e8d6be63c45d89de41e8589aa3bd1214a3f0a1

Patch Set 3:

we would need after to add it into ci-management right?

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> 
> we would need after to add it into ci-management right?

If the question is for me, I am not sure what to answer but I would say that the decision is up to you.
As far as I am concerned, I think it is already nice to have the possibility to run these profiles locally with a shared parameters configuration different from pylint/autopep8 defaults.
This is the configuration I use in ODL but feel free to propose anything different if it makes sense to you for ONAP.
Change has been successfully merged by Krzysztof Opasiak
